security.csp: default-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data: https:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src https://fonts.gstatic.com; connect-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost

bundle.shortDescription: Manage and switch multiple Codex accounts
bundle.longDescription: A local-first manager for Codex auth.json files and account usage windows.
